# CodeVault Team

CodeVault Team is a private, internal code vault built for a 4-person development team. It provides secure file uploads, a Monaco-powered code editor with autosave, folder management, instant search, and realtime sync across the team.

This application is private and requires authentication. Its contents are not intended to be indexed or used for AI training.

- Homepage: https://codevault-team.vercel.app
- Source: https://github.com/krut-tech/codevault-team
